title: zeltnera pusilla
intro: Zeltnera pusilla, also known as Small Purple Sage, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including inflammation and digestive issues, due to its purported medicinal properties. The leaves and stems of Zeltnera pusilla contain bioactive compounds that may have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, potentially offering health benefits such as reduced oxidative stress and improved gut health. Zeltnera pusilla is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil, and it may also be used in tinctures or salves, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
